scope: Migrate 19 raw-substring AST-pattern entries `("", "Module.fn")` to structured shape `("Module", "fn")` in RUBY_AST_* (6: 5 sources + 1 sink), ELIXIR_AST_* (7: 4 sources + 3 sinks), OCAML_AST_* (6: 3 sources + 3 sinks), then atomically delete RUBY_PATTERNS / ELIXIR_PATTERNS / OCAML_PATTERNS source+sink Vec entries AND 6 obsolete unit tests in taint_tests.rs (3 detect_sources + 3 detect_sinks). Sanitizer banks RETAINED. Subscript-shape entries (params[, ENV[) RETAINED as raw-substring AST entries. NO source change to field_access_info itself or extract_call_name_* — the existing W2-pre call-shape path in member_patterns_match (taint.rs:2989-3009) is the architectural enabler; this milestone aligns entry shape with what that path expects. Investigation reframed the original 'extend field_access_info' framing — see plan.md §0.

validator_mandates.no_field_access_info_source_change: Executor MUST NOT modify field_access_info() in ast_utils.rs:369 or any extract_call_name_* helper. The architectural enabler is the W2-pre call-shape path at taint.rs:2989-3009; only AST-pattern entry shape changes (taint.rs L2298+, L2726+, L2779+) and regex-bank deletions (taint.rs L564-585, L692-707, L720-737) are in scope.
validator_mandates.m1_red_first: M1 RED integration tests MUST land before M2/M3/M4 structured-shape rewrites (TDD discipline).
validator_mandates.m1_red_harness_spec: M1 MUST include a transient-bank-empty harness inside crates/tldr-core/tests/rr_module_function_integ_test.rs. Pattern: an `analyze_ast_only(src, lang, fn_name)` helper that calls compute_taint_with_tree against a temporarily-cleared LanguagePatterns (sources/sinks Vecs forced empty) — mirrors the 'AST-only mode simulation' pattern proven in regex-removal-v1 W2-pre (W2-pre-report.json line 45). Each of the 18 Module.function fixtures (24 total minus 6 regression/baseline) MUST be asserted under BOTH dispatch paths: (a) regular `analyze` — PASSES at HEAD because regex bank still catches them (proves additive coverage today); (b) `analyze_ast_only` — FAILS at HEAD pre-M2 because raw-substring entries are skipped on the structural and call-shape paths and the regex bank is bypassed (this is the RED gate that M2/M3/M4 turn GREEN). Post-M5 the AST-only path is the only path; deletion is safe because (b) already passes.
validator_mandates.m5_atomic: M5 deletion of regex banks + raw-fallback duplicates MUST ship in ONE commit. No partial-fix follow-ups.
validator_mandates.m5_taint_tests_cleanup: M5 MUST delete 6 obsolete unit tests in crates/tldr-core/src/security/taint_tests.rs: test_ruby_detect_sources (L1123), test_ruby_detect_sinks (L1196), test_elixir_detect_sources (L1432), test_elixir_detect_sinks (L1477), test_ocaml_detect_sources (L1536), test_ocaml_detect_sinks (L1595). All 6 call detect_sources()/detect_sinks() which iterate patterns.sources/sinks; M5 empties those Vecs for Ruby/Elixir/OCaml, so the tests' `assert!(!result.is_empty())` lines fail deterministically. KEEP all sanitizer-touching tests (L1253, L1518, L1638) — sanitizer banks are retained. Total obsolete test count: 6, not 3.
validator_mandates.m2_m3_m4_serial: M2, M3, M4 ALL edit the same file (crates/tldr-core/src/security/taint.rs) at non-overlapping ranges (RUBY_AST_* L2298+, ELIXIR_AST_* L2726+, OCAML_AST_* L2779+). Naive parallelisation would race on the same file. Executor MUST serialize: M2 → M3 → M4 → M5. Each is +15-21 LOC; serial execution adds <5 minutes total.
validator_mandates.subscript_shape_retained: RUBY_AST_SOURCES entries `("", "params[")` and `("", "ENV[")` MUST be retained (subscripts are not Module.function-shaped; covered by raw-substring fallback). M5 STOP threshold includes subscript regression fixture.
validator_mandates.sanitizer_retained: All 16 sanitizer regex banks RETAINED — deferred to sanitizer-removal-v1 (regex-removal-v1 W3 T1 carry-forward).

staging_method.verification: git show HEAD --stat | grep -E 'continuum/autonomous/(?!field_access_info-extension-v1-plan/)' && echo LEAK || echo STAGING-OK
staging_method.rationale: Prevents accidental staging of unrelated continuum/autonomous artifacts; only this plan's reports + the source code edits per milestone are eligible. Cargo.lock NEVER staged (`git checkout HEAD -- Cargo.lock` before each commit).

milestones.title: Author 24 RED integration tests for Ruby/Elixir/OCaml Module.function shapes
stop_thresholds: All 24 tests compile

M1 RED harness implemented: `analyze_ast_only(src, lang, fn_name)` helper in rr_module_function_integ_test.rs that transiently clears patterns.sources/sinks Vec for the target language before invoking compute_taint_with_tree. Mirrors W2-pre 'AST-only mode simulation' (regex-removal-v1 reports/W2-pre-report.json:45).

RED capture: each of the 18 Module.function fixtures runs through BOTH paths and asserts (a) regular `analyze` PASSES at HEAD (regex bank covers it — additive coverage today), (b) `analyze_ast_only` FAILS at HEAD for all 19 Module.function entries pre-M2/M3/M4 (raw-substring receiver-empty entries are skipped on structural+call-shape paths; regex bank bypassed). This is the gating RED for M2/M3/M4.
Regression-guard fixtures (3 string-literal tests) and per-language-baseline fixtures (3 tests) PASS under regular `analyze` at HEAD (no behavior change expected).
Existing val001a/val001b/val002/val003/taint_tests.rs remain GREEN

green_files.deletion_rationale: All 6 unit tests exercise detect_sources() / detect_sinks() — the regex-bank path. Post-M5 the regex Vecs for Ruby/Elixir/OCaml sources+sinks are empty, so detect_sources()/detect_sinks() return empty for those types and the tests' is_empty() negative-assertions fail. Cargo test --workspace will FAIL deterministically without these deletions; cleanup is gating for the M5 atomic commit.

Without this, cargo test --workspace fails deterministically.

cargo clippy --all-targets --workspace -- -D warnings PASS (no dead_code from unused regex variants, no unused imports)

milestones.rollback_rule: If any post-commit assertion fails, REVERT entire commit and re-investigate. NO partial-fix follow-up commits.

milestones.title: CHANGELOG entry + local tag

green_files.purpose: Internal-milestone entry per regex-removal-v1 W3-M12 precedent
sections: ### Changed: AST-only matching for Ruby/Elixir/OCaml sources+sinks via structured (receiver, field) tuples; W2-pre call-shape path now load-bearing for these 3 langs

### Removed: RUBY_PATTERNS/ELIXIR_PATTERNS/OCAML_PATTERNS source+sink Vec entries; matching detect_sinks regex unit tests in taint_tests.rs; raw-fallback duplicate AST entries superseded by structured shape
### Retained: All 16 sanitizer regex banks (sanitizer-removal-v1); subscript-shape entries (params[, ENV[)
### Architectural note: NO source change to field_access_info or extract_call_name_*; the 'extension' is in pattern-bank entry shape, not in the AST helper itself

Local tag field_access_info-extension-v1 applied
NO push, NO publish, NO version bump

ruby_elixir_ocaml_subscript_raw_fallback.reason: Subscripts (params[, ENV[) are NOT Module.function-shaped; tree-sitter parses them as element_reference / subscript nodes, not call nodes. The W2-pre call-shape path does not apply.

all_16_sanitizer_banks.reason: Carry-forward from regex-removal-v1 W3 T1 — detect_sanitizer_ast not yet wired into per-line dispatch.

loc_delta_summary.note: M5 deletion now -215 LOC (was -65) — incorporates 3 additional detect_sources unit tests (~171 LOC) discovered by premortem. M1 +25 for analyze_ast_only harness helper. Net total drops from 134 to 9; excluding test additions/deletions, the milestone removes ~161 LOC (sanitizer-only LanguagePatterns shells dominate the remaining footprint). All numbers approximate; executor sees true delta in git diff.

investigation_findings.critical_reframe: The original 'extend field_access_info' framing is incorrect. Investigation reveals the W2-pre call-shape path in member_patterns_match (taint.rs:2989-3009) ALREADY handles Module.function shapes for Ruby/Elixir/OCaml — it splits dotted call names from extract_call_name_* on rfind('.') to reconstruct (receiver, field) tuples. The retain entries in RUBY_AST_*/ELIXIR_AST_*/OCAML_AST_* use raw-substring shape ('', 'X.y') which the call-shape path explicitly skips (taint.rs:2996-2998). The fix is mechanical entry-shape migration, NOT a helper extension.

extract_call_name_coverage.elixir: extract_call_name_elixir (ast_utils.rs:789-795) returns node_text(target) which is 'System.cmd' for System.cmd(x, []) and 'Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query' for the multi-segment case ✓
extract_call_name_coverage.ocaml: extract_call_name_ocaml (ast_utils.rs:797-801) returns node_text(child(0)) which is 'Sys.command' for Sys.command cmd ✓

exact_retain_entry_count.verification: Source-verified at HEAD 8099a5d (premortem) and d1c0ecf (amendment): RUBY_AST_SOURCES taint.rs:2298-2328 (5 entries: STDIN.read/gets/readline + File.read/open) + RUBY_AST_SINKS L2330-2351 (1: IO.popen) = 6. ELIXIR_AST_SOURCES L2726-2742 (4: IO.gets, System.get_env, File.read, File.read!) + ELIXIR_AST_SINKS L2744-2760 (3: System.cmd, Code.eval_string, Ecto.Adapters.SQL.query) = 7. OCAML_AST_SOURCES L2779-2800 (3: Sys.getenv, In_channel.read_all, In_channel.input_all) + OCAML_AST_SINKS L2802-2818 (3: Sys.command, Unix.execvp, Sqlite3.exec) = 6. Total = 19.
exact_retain_entry_count.amendment_history: Initial dispatch contract said 18 (OCaml miscounted as 5). Amended post-premortem: OCaml 5→6, total 18→19. M4 itemization in this contract was already correct; no change needed there.

subscript_entries_NOT_migrated.reason: Not Module.function-shaped; subscripts use element_reference node, not call node
